subtitles.reset: Enter and confirm your new password
subtitles.error: The link has expired or is invalid
subtitles.success: You can now log in with your new password

alerts.sessionClosed: Your current session has been closed to proceed with the password reset.
alerts.invalidLink: Invalid reset link. Please request a new link from the login page.
alerts.tokenInvalid: The reset link is invalid or has expired.
alerts.tokenExpired: The reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new link from the login page.
alerts.tokenNotValid: The reset token is not valid. Please request a new link from the login page.

errorStatus.title: Invalid link
errorStatus.message: The reset link is invalid or has expired.
errorStatus.redirect: You will be redirected to the login page in a few seconds...

successStatus.title: Password reset!
successStatus.message: Your password has been reset successfully.
successStatus.redirect: You will be redirected to the login page in a few seconds...
